choices.text: Ask where they were
Ask what they saw
Probe the timeline
Challenge their alibi
Ask about their connection to the victim
Ask about their recent behavior
Press on the contradictions
Suggest you understand why it happened

nodes.text: I was at home that evening. I have already been over this.

choices.text: Where exactly?
Can anyone verify that?

nodes.text: In my apartment. The entire evening. I did not go out. I did not think I would need to document an ordinary Tuesday night.
I live alone. There is no one to call. That is not unusual. Most people do not keep a chaperone.
I was not near {place} that evening. Not at any point.

choices.text: Witnesses put you there.
Are you certain?

nodes.text: Then they are mistaken. Or they have their own reasons for pointing in my direction. I cannot account for what other people claim to have seen.
Completely certain. I know exactly where I was. I do not confuse my evenings.
My timeline is what I gave you. {time_phrase}. At home. I have said this.

choices.text: How can you be so precise?
The timing does not match.

nodes.text: I checked my phone. Notifications. Around {time_phrase}, possibly just before. It is there in the history if you need to look.
The timing I have given you is accurate. If you are searching for a gap, there is not one. I have been consistent.
I was home. I have told you this three times now. I do not understand what more you want.

choices.text: No one can place you there.
There is a gap in the window you described.

nodes.text: I was alone at home. That is not a crime. There is nothing to place me anywhere because I was not anywhere. I was home.
I stepped outside briefly. For air. Perhaps ten minutes. I did not think it warranted mentioning because it meant nothing.
We had a professional relationship. Cordial enough. Nothing that would be relevant to this.

choices.text: Was there tension between you?
When did you last see them?

nodes.text: We disagreed on certain things. That is the nature of any professional arrangement. It did not go beyond that.
Last week. Briefly, at {place}. We spoke for a few minutes. Nothing worth noting at the time.
My behavior has been entirely normal. I do not know what you are suggesting.

choices.text: People say you seemed different lately.
You were under a great deal of pressure.

nodes.text: What does unusual mean? I have been going about my life the same as always. If someone told you otherwise, I would like to know who.
Everyone has stress. I have not been any different from usual. This kind of thing — it is just a fishing expedition.
I have not contradicted myself. You may want to review your notes more carefully.

choices.text: Your account does not match others we spoke to.
Take your time. Think about what you are saying.

nodes.text: I have given you the same account every time. If there is a discrepancy, it is in how you are reading it, not in what I said.
I understand the tactic. You are looking for the moment I change my story. You will not find it because there is nothing to find.
What exactly are you implying?

choices.text: That the victim may have pushed someone past their limit.
That circumstances can force a person's hand.
That someone may have been trying to protect another person.
That this may not have been intended to go this far.

nodes.text: I will not say they deserved it. Whatever difficulties existed between us, I would not characterize it that way. I want to be clear about that.
Circumstances. That is an interesting frame. I am telling you I was not involved, so whatever circumstances you are describing did not involve me.
Protect someone. That is a theory. I was at home. There was no one to protect and no situation that required it.
Accidental. You are still suggesting I was there. I was not. The question does not apply to me.
